data.body: LIVE-CHECK ATTESTATION (dogfood, 2026-07-13): the deployed auto-lander landed a REAL single-change stack end-to-end on main — change #618 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/618), status MERGED, submitter 'Rebar Bot Nava' (the bot, not a human). Flow: Autosubmit+1 was set and the agent walked away; the bot selected it, main advanced under it, so it rebased to a fresh Patch Set 3, awaited a fresh Verified+1 on the rebased tree, and ancestor-atomic-submitted the exact tested SHA -> merged. This exercised the full R5-preserving await-fresh-Verified + submit path against the live Gerrit 3.14.1 instance. Fresh-Verified-per-member await + ancestor-atomic submit proven live (PS3 earned a fresh Verified+1 before submit; single tip submit -> MERGED).
